Kampala, Uganda — est. 2005

Mukula David
/ Muks Generation

Software Developer · Flutter & Systems Engineering · Electrical Engineering Student

A developer who thinks in circuits before he thinks in code — building mobile apps, institutional software, and brand systems for businesses across Uganda, grounded in a family history of enterprise, service, and land.

MUKULA DAVID — KAMPALA
01 — Profile

Developer, engineer, builder.

Muks is a software developer and the founder of Muks Generation, a Kampala-based development practice specializing in mobile applications, institutional software systems, and brand design for businesses across Uganda.

With a foundation that bridges software engineering and electrical engineering, Muks brings a systems-level way of thinking to every project — understanding how components connect, where current flows, and how to build something that holds together under real use.

02 — Circuit

The path so far.

2005

Born — Mpigi Town Council

Born January 22, 2005, at Mpigi Health Centre IV, Uganda.

2018

Mpigi Parents Primary School

Completed the Primary Leaving Examinations (PLE).

2019 – 2023

St. Mark's Secondary School, Kammengo

Sat Uganda Certificate of Education (UCE) in 2020 and carried through to A-Level completion in 2023, navigating the disruption of the COVID-19 pandemic along the way.

2024 – 2025

Nile Vocational Institute, Njeru

National Certificate in Electrical Systems.

2026 — present

UICT, Nakawa

Diploma in Electrical Engineering, currently in progress.

03 — Practice

What Muks Generation builds.

Mobile

Flutter development

End-to-end mobile builds — architecture, UI, and release engineering, including resolving Gradle, Kotlin, and Firebase build-pipeline issues to ship stable, release-ready Android apps.

Systems

Institutional software

Full-scale management platforms for real institutions — enrollment, HR, finance, timetabling, exams, and analytics, built for day-to-day operational use across multiple user roles.

Brand

Design & identity systems

Complete visual identity work for client businesses — color palettes, typography systems, and polished, print-ready brand documents.

Infrastructure

Networking & hardware

Hands-on configuration of real-world network setups, from gateway routers to switch topologies, ensuring the infrastructure is as solid as the code.

04 — Origin

Where it comes from.

Father

Auk Mathew Belmont

Born Dec 28, 1948 · Soroti
Settled in Namavundu, Gayaza, Wakiso District
Passed away Jan 26, 2026

A professional headmaster, National Scout leader, law enforcement officer at ULDC, and a paralegal social worker.

Mother

Resty Nalumansi Kizza

Born Feb 22, 1975 · Busabala, Wakiso District

A business lady and farmer.

Raised in Wakiso District between service, education, and land — a household of headmasters and harvests. That grounding shows up in how Muks builds: patient, thorough, and made to last.
